overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with first-person exploration of a trash-strewn elevated walkway, transitioning to third-person perspective following a character with cybernetic enhancements through a neon-lit commercial plaza bustling with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with vegetation and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: camera pans left to observe the dense vegetation lining the walkway
perspective switches from first-person to third-person follow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden pathway, briefly turning to observe the lush vegetation on the left side

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the elevated pedestrian path
tall concrete wall covered in graffiti and street art
lush tropical trees and bushes growing alongside the path
garbage bags and litter scattered along the walkway edges
metal and glass bridge structure spanning across the corridor

segments.scene_description: A first-person walk along an elevated wooden pathway bordered by dense greenery on the left and a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right. Trash and debris are scattered across the planks. The camera moves steadily forward through this semi-enclosed urban corridor, briefly panning left to observe the vegetation before transitioning to a third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian plaza with neon signage and shops

events.description: character navigates down concrete stairs and turns right through the plaza
entering a more densely populated area with increased pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through the commercial plaza as a character with a cybernetic arm and purple shorts, passing by various NPCs and shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown outfit walking past the player character
character with white hair and cybernetic implants standing near a shop entrance

entered.detail: futuristic storefronts with glowing signage and metal facades
large holographic advertisements displaying colorful animated content
wide concrete staircase leading to lower plaza levels
black metal safety railings along the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person, following a character with distinctive purple shorts and a cybernetic arm through a vibrant commercial plaza. Neon billboards and futuristic shop fronts line the path as the character navigates past stairs and moderate crowds of pedestrians. The environment opens up to reveal towering buildings with holographic advertisements overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, derelict urban corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit commercial plaza. It begins in a first-person perspective, moving steadily along an elevated wooden pathway cluttered with debris and bordered by a graffiti-covered concrete wall and dense greenery. As the camera pans briefly toward the vegetation, the perspective shifts to third-person, trailing a character with a cybernetic arm and purple shorts. The scene then opens up as the character navigates past pedestrians and stairs, moving away from the enclosed walkway and into a vibrant district. Finally, the environment expands to reveal a wide plaza dominated by towering buildings and glowing holographic advertisements overhead.
